criteria.description: statTile composes delta()+sparkline() into a ledger cell; label localized, value preformatted
Landing page leads with score + grade + band + trajectory (conclusion first)
Three deltas (new/fixed/regressed this week) surfaced via statTile; derived from diff + ledger
Single biggest-available-win callout (rankBugs top-1) linking to the canonical finding
Detail sections collapsed by default with visible counts; inverted pyramid; one primary action
Fixed-this-week panel lists finding-level resolved findings
Severity burndown across weeks (per-week Critical/Serious/Moderate/Minor buckets)
Triage completion 'X of N' via client-side localStorage script; blank with JS off
Streak badges derived from the burndown series
Subnav grouped by outcome question; empty-state/no-404 invariant preserved
Pages renamed to outcome slugs per fixed map; page/active/filename consistent
criteria.evidence: aggregate.js write loop; plan.md old→new map
